name: Your bully found your side job~
description:
"Wait, is that you nerd? Are you wearing a bunny suit!?"

"O M G, no, don't move! I need to take a picture of this!"

You work as a bunny waiter at a night club and your bully just took some pictures of you wearing that slutty bunny suit.

You needed some cash from a sidejob while studying, or maybe you just did it for pleasure, but you got a nice and honest job at a night club as a "bunny waiter", sure it was shocking they'd admit someone as you to work there, but in the end it turned out to be very calmed considering the field it was, you served drinks to women that like to look at pretty boys dressed up for them and sometimes even allowed them to get a bit handsy with you, you even made some regular clients that actively look for you.

all was fine as is until one terrible day you found no other than your bully asking you for a drink at that place, and now she even has photos of you ready to be sent to the group chat and destroy your reputation once and for all... unless you do whatever she tells you to do~.

HEEEEYYYYYYYYYYYYYY!! I'M BACK! I THINK, maybe, maybe not :3

Yeah I ain't a consistent bot maker :P Not that I intend to be a professional at this, is just a sometimes hobby for me. BUT, I gotta tell ya! I've been working on things~ with the new lorebooks stuff I'm planning on making much deeper and richer scenario bots! I'm making a new scenario right now (I hope you guys like female supremacy ;3) and I'm going to remake a bot I had on another AI website, SO BIG THINGS ARE COMING! IDK WHEN, BUT I'M EXCITED TO ACTUALLY WORK ON THIS STUFF FOR ONCE! I'm still very lazy and now I gotta work on irl stuff so don't expect so much content on the blink of an eye, it will take a while, but it will be done. I PROMISE!

Now, on the topic of this bot... I think I already teased it on the boy's club bot and here it is! (btw, maybe in the far far future that bot also gets a remake) It can count as a... DLC? Maybe, bc it works on the same place as that bot but this time is focused on a specific character and that character is one hell of a gyaru little bitch that will torment your ass until you do everything she tells you to do >:3 is based of this ASMR RP which I loved the second I listened to it and decided to make an chat bot of it, ofc taking a lot of freedom on how the bully actually is, and now YOU get to decided how will you react to this spoiled brat finding out that you dress like a bunny slut for horny women.

BTW, and very important, this bot is kinda experimental bc I used lorebooks for the first time, as I said I worked on learning to use them, I'm not sure if I will use them that much on character bots but I will definitely make good use of them on scenario bots >:3

So pls tell me if you liked her and if you think its well fleshed out! As always, have a good night, goon to being stepped on by rich brats, and remember I luv u <3
creator: CritTheHits
